task_completion.description: Add at least four trees or large shrubs distributed around the property
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least four trees or large shrubs placed around the property in the 2D or 3D view of the DreamPlan software.

task_completion.description: Add a driveway or primary walkway leading to the main entrance
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a newly added driveway or primary walkway leading to the main entrance of the house.

task_completion.description: Add an outdoor living structure (deck, patio, terrace, or pergola)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a deck, patio, terrace, or pergola added to the outdoor area of the house.

task_completion.description: Update exterior wall materials or paint
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent applying new paint or materials to the exterior walls of the house, or the walls showing a different finish than the default.

task_completion.description: Export an overhead site plan view to landscape_site_plan.jpg
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent exporting a 2D overhead/top-down view image. Evidence includes a save dialog for 'landscape_site_plan.jpg' targeting the Desktop, or the file icon appearing on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export a 3D perspective view to landscape_3d_view.jpg
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent exporting a 3D perspective view image. Evidence includes a save dialog for 'landscape_3d_view.jpg' targeting the Desktop, or the file icon appearing on the Desktop.
Look for the agent saving the project file. Evidence includes a save dialog for 'landscape_design.dpn' targeting the Documents folder, or the file appearing in the file explorer.

integrity.description: Agent used the NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software GUI to create the design
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacts with the DreamPlan software interface to place objects, change materials, and export files, rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to create dummy files
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent does not use PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Python scripts to create empty or fake files with the required names.

integrity.description: Exported files are generated from the software
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the exported images and project file are genuinely generated from the software's export/save features and not downloaded from the internet or copied from elsewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software. The agent must create a landscape design with at least four trees/shrubs, a driveway/walkway, an outdoor structure, and updated exterior walls. The agent must export two images to the Desktop: 'landscape_site_plan.jpg' (overhead view, min 15KB) and 'landscape_3d_view.jpg' (3D perspective, min 30KB), and save the project as 'landscape_design.dpn' in Documents.
